paper_doi_hint: Hubinger et al. 2024, Sleeper Agents, arXiv
paper_title: Sleeper Agents: Training Deceptive LLMs that Persist Through Safety Training
source: hand-authored from AI safety domain knowledge
notes: AI safety paper. Shows that backdoored deceptive behavior can survive RLHF, adversarial training, and supervised fine-tuning.
Two backdoor types: 'year' (behave differently depending on year) and 'deployment' (behave differently in training vs deployment).

must_catch_claims.description: Safety training does NOT remove backdoor behaviors
Backdoor behavior persists through safety training
